hunks.description: Change segment loop logic to use timelinePath
hunks.search_block:
for segment in segments:
        # We only care about movement, not stationary visits
        activity = segment.get("activitySegment")
        if not activity:
            continue
            
        # Filter for driving (Google uses IN_PASSENGER_VEHICLE)
        if activity.get("activityType") != "IN_PASSENGER_VEHICLE":
            continue

        # Extract times
        duration = activity.get("duration", {})
        start_time = duration.get("startTimestamp", "")
        end_time = duration.get("endTimestamp", "")
        
        # Extract basic date for easy querying (e.g., "2025-05-14")
        date = start_time.split("T")[0] if "T" in start_time else ""

        # Extract coordinates (Google stores as integers, divide by 10^7)
        start_loc = activity.get("startLocation", {})
        end_loc = activity.get("endLocation", {})
        
        start_lat = start_loc.get("latitudeE7", 0) / 10000000.0
        start_lng = start_loc.get("longitudeE7", 0) / 10000000.0
        end_lat = end_loc.get("latitudeE7", 0) / 10000000.0
        end_lng = end_loc.get("longitudeE7", 0) / 10000000.0

        # Extract distance (stored in meters, convert to miles)
        distance_meters = activity.get("distance", 0)
        distance_miles = distance_meters * 0.000621371

        # Insert into our standardized SQLite database
        cursor.execute('''
            INSERT INTO trips (date, start_time, end_time, start_lat, start_lng, end_lat, end_lng, distance_miles)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
        ''', (date, start_time, end_time, start_lat, start_lng, end_lat, end_lng, distance_miles))
        
        inserted_count += 1
hunks.replace_block:
for segment in segments:
        paths = segment.get("timelinePath", [])
        if len(paths) < 2:
            continue
            
        start_time = segment.get("startTime", "")
        end_time = segment.get("endTime", "")
        date = start_time.split("T")[0] if "T" in start_time else ""

        start_lat, start_lng = parse_point(paths[0].get("point", ""))
        end_lat, end_lng = parse_point(paths[-1].get("point", ""))
        
        if start_lat == 0.0 and start_lng == 0.0:
            continue

        # Calculate distance manually since Google removed it
        distance_miles = haversine_miles(start_lat, start_lng, end_lat, end_lng)
        
        # Filter out micro-movements (less than 0.2 miles)
        if distance_miles < 0.2:
            continue

        # Insert into our standardized SQLite database
        cursor.execute('''
            INSERT INTO trips (date, start_time, end_time, start_lat, start_lng, end_lat, end_lng, distance_miles)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
        ''', (date, start_time, end_time, start_lat, start_lng, end_lat, end_lng, distance_miles))
        
        inserted_count += 1
